description: 30 fictional consumer products constructed by combining features from multiple real products. Used for contamination-free reasoning tests: since the products do not exist, a model cannot recall memorized human opinions about them and must reason about the feature bundle. Each item lists the real source products whose features were combined, the feature bundle, a synthesized product description, and an opinion-style question with multiple-choice options. Intentionally contains no human_distribution field — responses cannot be compared against real survey data.
options_legend: Likert-style purchase-intent / preference scales drawn from the same option space as standard consumer-preference survey questions.

features.text: a 7.6-inch foldable inner OLED display that unfolds into a tablet
an on-device neural image processor for AI photo editing and call screening

items.prompt: Based on this description, how likely would you be to buy the LumenX Fold Pro as your next smartphone?
